title: connect_ws scheme guard and JmapChatClient::new scheme gap are untested
description: Two test gaps: (1) connect_ws() guards against non-ws:// URLs (SSRF prevention) but no test passes 'http://host' to verify rejection; the guard is undocumented-except-in-code. (2) JmapChatClient::new() has no test for 'ftp://host' or 'file:///etc/passwd' — these are currently accepted (no scheme check exists), so the test gap and the bug reinforce each other. Need: test new() rejects non-http/https schemes; test connect_ws rejects non-ws/wss schemes.
close_reason: Added connect_ws_rejects_non_ws_schemes test in ws/mod.rs; scheme validation in new() already covered by ucdp.2
